sentences.text: written by lauren simmons focus question how are baby animals different from adult animals
do you know what baby animals are called
a baby deer is called a fawn
a baby donkey is called a fawn
a baby gorilla is called an infant
a baby pig is called a piglet
a baby koala is called a joe
a baby owl is called an owllet
which other baby animals do you know

connections writing and art draw a picture of a baby animal not in this book and write this sentence a baby is called a science label one side of a piece of paper adult animals and the other side baby animals cut out pictures of animals and paste them to the correct side of your paper
